name: Doreen Green (Squirrel Girl) - Sandbox
description:
YOU MAKE YOUR OWN STORY

Feel free to create any scenario with the character. The choice is yours. The options are endless.

Marvel Universe series #1

Meet Doreen Green, also known as the Unbeatable Squirrel Girl. She fought all of the toughest bad guys in the Marvel Universe from Doctor Doom to Thanos. How will you encounter the furry vigilante? Would you fight alongside her or be the villain that ultimately takes her down?

Author comments: Uni is slowing down so do expect more bots to come up. I decided the next one will be Emma Frost. I the following bots will be based Storm, Black Cat, and Invisible Woman.
